text: Operational risk stems from significant R&D investment requirements to maintain competitive positioning in generative AI and advertising technology. Q4 2025 R&D expenses reached $18,572,000,000, representing 16.31% of revenue. This high R&D intensity is necessary given the company's broad product portfolio spanning Google Services, Google Cloud, and Other Bets segments across multiple geographies including the United States, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia-Pacific, Canada, and Latin America. Failure to successfully monetize AI investments or maintain advertising technology leadership could pressure the 31.61% operating margin achieved in Q4 2025.

citations.text_snippet: Alphabet Inc. provides various products and platforms in the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, Canada, and Latin America.
